_comment: Sealed Barrier Zone (封印屏障区) — the edge of the Cave World where the Realm-Sealing Grand Array manifests as visible energy barriers. Canon: the seal is a vast formation that encloses the entire Cave World. Near the edges, the seal is visible as shimmering barriers of golden-purple light. The ground is cracked obsidian-like stone (the formation's anchor points). Dangerous — standing near the barrier damages lower-realm cultivators (enforced by gameplay code, not by the biome itself per the Prime Directive). Temperature is hot (barrier energy), no precipitation. Features: none (barren zone). This biome generates at the outermost continent noise values.
